revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikivoyage inline/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wikivoyage inline/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
== Usage ==
As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[:en:Wikivoyage|Wikivoyage]] link to a Wikipedia article. It generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|interwikimedia link]] – it is not intended to represent [[WP:SOURCES|sources]] for Wikipedia articles. It should only be used as an "External link", never as a citation.
The template can be used with one, two or no parameters as follows: :'''<nowiki>{{Wikivoyage inline}}</nowiki>''' creates a link to the Wikivoyage page matching the Wikipedia page name. :'''<nowiki>{{Wikivoyage inline|Boracay}}</nowiki>''' creates a link to the Wikivoyage page titled "Boracay". :'''<nowiki>{{Wikivoyage inline|Boracay|Boracay Island}}</nowiki>''' creates a link to the Wikivoyage page titled "Boracay", but the link is worded "Boracay Island".
== See also == * [[Template:Wikivoyage]] * [[Template:Wikivoyage listing]] * [[:en:Template:Wikisource redirect|Template:Wikisource redirect]] {{Commons templates see also}}
==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} <templatedata> { "params": { "1": { "label": "Page name of Wikivoyage Article", "description": "Specify the exact name of the Wikivoyage article, as specified in the URL after \"wiki/\" This field is used to look up the Wikivoyage article.", "example": "London (Ontario)", "type": "string" }, "2": { "label": "User friendly name of Wikivoyage article", "description": "This is the text that will be displayed to identify the name of the place or topic of the Wikivoyage article", "example": "\"London\" or \"London, Ontario\" or \"London, ON\"", "type": "string" }, "list": {}, "links": {}, "extratext": {} }, "description": "This template is intended for adding an external link within a Wikipedia article to the corresponding Wikivoyage article. If the Wikipedia and Wikivoyage articles are identical, no parameters need to be set.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "list", "links", "extratext" ] } </templatedata> <includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Inline interwiki link templates]] [[Category:Wikivoyage templates|Inline]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
== Usage ==
As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[:en:Wikivoyage|Wikivoyage]] link to a Wikipedia article. It generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|interwikimedia link]] – it is not intended to represent [[WP:SOURCES|sources]] for Wikipedia articles. It should only be used as an "External link", never as a citation.
The template can be used with one, two or no parameters as follows: :'''<nowiki>{{Wikivoyage inline}}</nowiki>''' creates a link to the Wikivoyage page matching the Wikipedia page name. :'''<nowiki>{{Wikivoyage inline|Boracay}}</nowiki>''' creates a link to the Wikivoyage page titled "Boracay". :'''<nowiki>{{Wikivoyage inline|Boracay|Boracay Island}}</nowiki>''' creates a link to the Wikivoyage page titled "Boracay", but the link is worded "Boracay Island".
== See also == * [[Template:Wikivoyage]] * [[Template:Wikivoyage listing]] * [[:en:Template:Wikisource redirect|Template:Wikisource redirect]] {{Commons templates see also}}
==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} <templatedata> { "params": { "1": { "label": "Page name of Wikivoyage Article", "description": "Specify the exact name of the Wikivoyage article, as specified in the URL after \"wiki/\" This field is used to look up the Wikivoyage article.", "example": "London (Ontario)", "type": "string" }, "2": { "label": "User friendly name of Wikivoyage article", "description": "This is the text that will be displayed to identify the name of the place or topic of the Wikivoyage article", "example": "\"London\" or \"London, Ontario\" or \"London, ON\"", "type": "string" }, "list": {}, "links": {}, "extratext": {} }, "description": "This template is intended for adding an external link within a Wikipedia article to the corresponding Wikivoyage article. If the Wikipedia and Wikivoyage articles are identical, no parameters need to be set.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "list", "links", "extratext" ] } </templatedata> <includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Inline interwiki link templates]] [[Category:Wikivoyage templates|Inline]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
== Usage ==
As supported by [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]], this template may be used to add a [[:en:Wikivoyage|Wikivoyage]] link to a Wikipedia article. It generates an [[Help:Interwikimedia links|interwikimedia link]] – it is not intended to represent [[WP:SOURCES|sources]] for Wikipedia articles. It should only be used as an "External link", never as a citation.
The template can be used with one, two or no parameters as follows: :'''<nowiki>{{Wikivoyage inline}}</nowiki>''' creates a link to the Wikivoyage page matching the Wikipedia page name. :'''<nowiki>{{Wikivoyage inline|Boracay}}</nowiki>''' creates a link to the Wikivoyage page titled "Boracay". :'''<nowiki>{{Wikivoyage inline|Boracay|Boracay Island}}</nowiki>''' creates a link to the Wikivoyage page titled "Boracay", but the link is worded "Boracay Island".
== See also == * [[Template:Wikivoyage]] * [[Template:Wikivoyage listing]] * [[:en:Template:Wikisource redirect|Template:Wikisource redirect]] {{Commons templates see also}}
==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} <templatedata> { "params": { "1": { "label": "Page name of Wikivoyage Article", "description": "Specify the exact name of the Wikivoyage article, as specified in the URL after \"wiki/\" This field is used to look up the Wikivoyage article.", "example": "London (Ontario)", "type": "string" }, "2": { "label": "User friendly name of Wikivoyage article", "description": "This is the text that will be displayed to identify the name of the place or topic of the Wikivoyage article", "example": "\"London\" or \"London, Ontario\" or \"London, ON\"", "type": "string" }, "list": {}, "links": {}, "extratext": {} }, "description": "This template is intended for adding an external link within a Wikipedia article to the corresponding Wikivoyage article. If the Wikipedia and Wikivoyage articles are identical, no parameters need to be set.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "list", "links", "extratext" ] } </templatedata> <includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Inline interwiki link templates]] [[Category:Wikivoyage templates|Inline]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
